# Cyber・X・Lab

> Modern, responsive, batteries-included Hugo theme for creating beautiful static websites.

### Advanced Topics
- [Additional Pages](https://cyberxlab.3344198.xyz/docs/advanced/additional-pages/): Hextra includes additional pages that you can enable explicitly: glossary and archives.
- [Multi-language](https://cyberxlab.3344198.xyz/docs/advanced/multi-language/): Hextra supports creating site with multiple languages using Hugo&rsquo;s multilingual mode .
- [Comments System](https://cyberxlab.3344198.xyz/docs/advanced/comments/): Hextra supports adding comments system to your site. Currently giscus is supported.
